summary.text: Customers find these shoes very comfortable with great support and superb quality. They appreciate the great look and versatility of the lightweight design. However, many note that the sizing runs small and is inaccurate. Customers have mixed opinions on the overall fit and durability of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Best shoes
authors_reviews.text: I’ve always loved Nike shoes. They are amazing and they feel so comfortable and I love working out with them. They also look so sexy.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Fit. I love this shoe
authors_reviews.text: I liked this shoe the first time I ordered it years ago, I ordered it again. A very comfortable well-fitting shoe. I walk a lot and this is the perfect shoe. It's nice-looking too
authors_reviews.author: Margaret

authors_reviews.title: It's comfortable and cute
authors_reviews.text: It fits nicely and I like the style. It's not too flashy which is what I was aiming for, but still a good-looking shoe.
authors_reviews.author: Kris

authors_reviews.title: Lightweight and good quality
authors_reviews.text: Shoes arrived quickly and were a good fit. Nice and lightweight for exercising.
authors_reviews.author: janis dilk

authors_reviews.title: On time, the right fit. I just felt they were not comfortable enough. Not walking on a cloud.
authors_reviews.text: On time, the right fit. I just felt they were not comfortable enough. Not walking on a cloud.
authors_reviews.author: Tiggs

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable shoe
authors_reviews.text: Nike shoes fit me perfectly. A very comfortable shoe for long distance walking/running
authors_reviews.author: Linda Hedderson

authors_reviews.title: Arrived stained and dirty.
authors_reviews.text: Very disappointed to receive with several bright yellow stains like something was spilled on one of the shoes? I had to reorder a new pair, hopefully they will be clean and new?
authors_reviews.author: Jen
